'''Mon Tondievz, Ltd.''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company that provided the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] with its cache of [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]], which was the new government's basis for hard currency. The headquarters for the company were located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Krann]]. Its [[Chief of Security/Legends|chief of security]] was [[Vanel (Human)|Vanel]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=For a Few Kilotons More|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
